description: This email template offers a modern and playful approach to education, perfect for monthly updates or personal notes. With its back-to-school vibe, it's designed to keep parents and students informed about the latest happenings in a colorful and engaging way. The layout is educational, focusing on sharing knowledge in a fun, accessible manner. The design's bright colors and modern elements are sure to capture attention, making it easier to share important school updates, educational news, and personal achievements. It's a great tactic for creating a sense of community within the school environment, keeping everyone connected and informed. Ideal for monthly school newsletters, this template is a vibrant way to enhance communication between school and home.
short_description: Stay updated with this vibrant, modern email template. Ideal for back to school updates and monthly newsletters, this playful and colorful design keeps the school community engaged and informed. Perfect for sharing educational news, events, and personal notes.

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))

html_data:
ABOUT FACILITIES ENROLLMENT CONTACT US
 
 

GOOD AFTERNOON
CREEK COMMUNITY!

Back in the office for good now.
Summer vacations and lacrosse have concluded. Now, my full attention turns to the approaching school year. It is approaching quickly. Great planning going on. I am very excited for the school year. With  that, gonna throw a lot of stuff at you. So, read carefully. Open the attachments. Take care of what you can take care of sooner rather than later.

 
 
VISIT THE WEBSITE
ENROLL NOW
 
 
 
 

With that, gonna throw a lot of stuff at you. So, read carefully. Open the attachments. Take care of what you can take care of sooner rather than later.

 
 

SCHEDULE

Here are the center's schedules

 

COFFEE WITH STEVE

10am and 6pm in the TCHS Media Center

I AM AN EAGLE

Thursday, July 29
(see attached flyer)

OPEN HOUSE

Friday, August 6
4pm until 6pm

 
 

CHECKLIST

To make getting back into the swing of things easier and to help you make sure you've checked off all of the boxes as school starts, we have a checklist
for you.

DOWNLOAD NOW
 

SOPHOMORES

Hey parents of rising Sophomores. We know your Freshman year at The Creek was not exactly normal. Your kids may be feeling just as anxious as the rising Freshmen. We got you. 

SIGN UP
 

CODE OF CONDUCT

The county has always asked/required parents and students to sign off on receipt of the Code of Conduct.The process is now embedded in
Infinite Campus.

DOWNLOAD NOW
 

COUNSELING

Two Joe's Creek (TJC) would like to share an opportunity with the community to talk trauma. We've all been through some stuff. How do we deal with that? How do our children deal with that?
TJC wants to have a community conversation
about that.

DOWNLOAD NOW
 

WHEW! QUICK BREATH. ALMOST DONE

That's for links and attachments. One last announcement.

 
 
FOR RISING SENIOR PARENTS

The results for the graduation venue survey were overwhelming. Jump Around Arena in Stone County it is. Still have to work through the process with the county, though. While our date and time will not be confirmed until January or February 2022, we have a tentative date and time, so mark your calendars. 

 
 
 
MAY 18 AT 7:30PM

I will stress all of this is tentative. And what is written here is what I know. Any and all details related to graduation will be coming later. I know some of you will ask questions about graduation.

My answer is, "I don't know."

 

I guess that'll do it for now. Have given you a lot to sift through and process. I'm around if you have a question (that I can answer). Enjoy the rest of your summer. Soak it up.

#WeAre
#BackAtIt
#SoManyAttachments
 
 
 

FACILITIES

ABOUT US

ENROLMENT

 
 

FAQ

COVID-19

UNSUBSCRIBE

title: School Newsletter
